name: media_upload
description: Upload one or more files to the Strapi media library. Supports images, documents, and videos. Files can optionally be linked to a content entry via ref, refId, and field parameters.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: The file(s) to upload (Buffer or Stream). Use multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: fileInfo
parameters.description: JSON object with metadata: name, alternativeText, caption.

parameters.name: refId
parameters.description: The ID of the entry to link the uploaded file to.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: The unique ID (UID) of the content type model to link to.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: The field name on the entry to attach the file to.

request_example.body: FormData with 'files' field containing the file
